text.message: red you want to do it for nb?
can you give anything other than wood
im nonbinding you on a terrible deal
you literally produce more brick than you do wood
i dont need wood. it is what it is
i guess i just have to keep hitting you then
and now  you have no brick
youre really trying to prove something huh
just play the game man, im not complaining
I’m still trying to settle - hard to trade the brick
well get some deals in the future
think i dont want to trade you actually
ill have to cutoff to settle
that would not be a good play
you coulda gone any other way
i need all the space i can get to challenge blue for road
going the other way doesnt give enough space
you can twist in towards them
truth is i need both directions
that gave you one more road
i plan on going in both directions
